properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let's think about our God Our Savior and our King The One who gave it all He gave up everything Let's think about the Man Who shed His precious blood So we could be His friends His friends until the end

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And give our love and praise to Him He is our Savior and our friend Let's give our love and praise to Him He is our Savior and our friend

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let's think about our Father's heart So right and true He's never given up Given up on me or you Let's think about our God Of love and mercy free He's washed us white as snow For all eternity

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: We love You Lord We love You Lord Just one thought of You And all we can say is :/

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let's think about our God The high and lofty One Who says He's never far From the brokenhearted ones Let's think about our Lord Who formed the stars above So we could have a glimpse Of His glory up above
